title: Closed: Permanent residence for out-of-status construction workers in the Greater Toronto Area - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed: Permanent residence for out-of-status construction workers in the Greater Toronto Area

## We’re no longer accepting new applications
This public policy closed on December 31, 2024. Applications submitted on or before this date will continue to be processed.
The temporary public policy for out-of-status construction workers in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) gave a limited number of construction workers and their dependants a pathway to permanent residence.
For this public policy, the GTA was defined as the City of Toronto and the regions of
Deadline: December 31, 2024
